name: One Bowl Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Microwave chocolate and margarine in a large microwavable bowl on HIGH for 2 minutes, or until the margarine is melted. Stir until the chocolate is completely melted.
3. Add sugar to the melted chocolate mixture and stir until well combined.
4. Mix in eggs and vanilla until well blended.
5. Stir in flour and nuts. Spread the batter into a greased 13x9" pan.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out with fudgy crumbs. Do not overbake. Cool in the pan; cut into bars.
Makes about 24 brownies.
Prep time: 10 minutes. Baking time: 30-35 minutes.
